project_diagnosis.root_structural_gap: The v4.4 refactor moved to a modular package layout (data/, logic/, components/, fuzzy/, visualization/) but the v4.3 test suite was never updated. Three test files open root-level app.py and db.py via filesystem path. Neither file exists. All test runs crash at import time before executing a single assertion.
project_diagnosis.data_pipeline_status: Structurally correct but unreachable from tests. data/db.py connects to Supabase and returns snake_case DataFrames. logic/services.py consumes snake_case columns. The chain is internally consistent.
project_diagnosis.test_suite_status: 8 test files present. Estimated passing without fixes: 2 (test_chart_logic.py, test_dataframe_utils.py). Estimated failing: 6.

layers.name: persistence
layers.responsibility: Supabase CRUD. All read/write operations. Exports MAX_IMPORT_ROWS=500, cargar_atletas, cargar_sesiones_raw, insertar_sesion, insertar_wellness, insertar_carga_grupal_batch, importar_dataframe, importar_wellness_dataframe, wellness_masivo_template.
layers.column_contract: All DataFrames use snake_case: nombre, fecha, vmp_hoy, vmp_ref, notas, created_at.

layers.name: business_logic
layers.responsibility: Metric computation (ACWR, delta_pct, z_meso, beta_aguda, beta_28, DQI, SWC). Pipeline Mamdani. Exports: SessionInput, calcular_metricas, pipeline_diagnostico, pipeline_batch, calcular_historial_fatiga, detectar_tendencia_mpv.
layers.column_contract: Consumes snake_case DataFrames from data layer. Filters on df['nombre'], df['fecha'], df['vmp_hoy'].

layers.name: fuzzy_engine
layers.responsibility: Mamdani v4.1 inference (5 inputs, 23 rules, COG defuzzification). Exports: construir_motor_fuzzy, evaluar_atleta. fuzzy/diving_rules.py exports conjunto_dominante_ci.

layers.name: visualization
layers.responsibility: Plotly figures. Exports: fig_membership_fuzzy, fig_semaforo_historico, fig_semaforo_barras, fig_vmp_tendencia, fig_historial_barras_atleta. All use dark theme via _DARK_LAYOUT.

layers.name: ui_components
layers.responsibility: Streamlit tab rendering. tab_ingreso uses btn_carga_grupal (wrong key). tab_dashboard contains _render_membership_panel but lacks calcular_membresias_atleta.
layers.issue: btn_carga_grupal key in tab_ingreso must be renamed to btn_guardar_carga

layers.name: entry_point
layers.responsibility: Streamlit orchestration. Calls render_tab_ingreso, render_tab_dashboard. Missing: app.py (required by tests), db.py (required by tests).
layers.issue: app.py and db.py absent. main_app.py cannot serve as test target.

layers.name: test_suite
layers.responsibility: Validation of all layers. Three files do filesystem reads on app.py and db.py at collection time, crashing the entire pytest run.
layers.issue: test_services.py imports from wrong path and uses PascalCase columns. test_diving_load.py imports from non-existent flat-root module.

critical_issues.title: app.py absent at repository root
critical_issues.impact: test_audit_fixes.py, test_security_hardening.py, test_ui_v43.py all crash at import time with FileNotFoundError before running any assertion.
critical_issues.resolution: Create app.py at root satisfying all structural checks enumerated in test_audit_fixes.py.

critical_issues.title: db.py absent at repository root
critical_issues.impact: Three test files do 'import db' which fails with ModuleNotFoundError. The real module is at data/db.py.
critical_issues.resolution: Create db.py at root as a re-export shim from data.db.

critical_issues.title: requirements.txt versions mismatch and loose pillow pin
critical_issues.impact: TestDependencyPinning fails on all 10 packages. pillow uses '>=' which also breaks the exact-pin check.
critical_issues.resolution: Rewrite requirements.txt with exact == pins matching PINNED_DEPS dict. Add pillow==10.3.0 and add pillow entry to PINNED_DEPS in test.

critical_issues.title: test_services.py uses wrong import path and PascalCase DataFrame columns
critical_issues.impact: All calcular_metricas tests return None silently because filter df[df['nombre']==atleta] finds zero rows when test DataFrames use 'Nombre'/'Fecha'/'VMP_Hoy'.
critical_issues.resolution: Replace sys.path hack + 'from services import' with 'from logic.services import'. Change all DataFrame column names to snake_case: nombre, fecha, vmp_hoy.

critical_issues.title: Button key mismatch in components/tab_ingreso.py
critical_issues.impact: TestTask5CargaSesionPersistence checks for 'btn_guardar_carga' in app.py source. Current component uses 'btn_carga_grupal'. The new app.py must also use btn_guardar_carga.
critical_issues.resolution: Rename key='btn_carga_grupal' to key='btn_guardar_carga' in the Guardar Carga Grupal button.

critical_issues.title: calcular_membresias_atleta and calcular_historial_batch_cached absent
critical_issues.impact: TestMembershipPanel does 'from app import calcular_membresias_atleta' — function does not exist anywhere. TestTask6 checks for calcular_historial_batch_cached with @st.cache_data decorator.
critical_issues.resolution: Define both functions in app.py. calcular_membresias_atleta(indice_fatiga: float) -> dict[str, float]. calcular_historial_batch_cached(df_raw, atletas: tuple, ventana_meso: int) -> dict[str, pd.DataFrame] with @st.cache_data(ttl=30).

critical_issues.title: test_diving_load.py imports from non-existent flat-root diving_load module
critical_issues.impact: Entire test file fails with ModuleNotFoundError. The functionality now lives in logic/biomechanics.py.
critical_issues.resolution: Replace 'from diving_load import ...' with 'from logic.biomechanics import ...'. All symbols are present in logic/biomechanics.py.

work_phases.name: Root Compatibility Shims
work_phases.description: Create the two missing root-level files that unblock all test collection. No logic changes. Pure file creation.

work_phases.name: Dependency Pinning
work_phases.description: Rewrite requirements.txt and update PINNED_DEPS in test. Independent of all other phases.

work_phases.name: Test Fixes (no production code changes)
work_phases.description: Fix test_services.py import path and column casing. Fix test_diving_load.py import. Fix button key in component.

work_phases.name: app.py Creation (central fix)
work_phases.description: Create the unified app.py satisfying all 14 structural checks from test_audit_fixes, containing the two missing functions, the RBAC guard, and the full Streamlit UI.

work_phases.name: Full Suite Verification
work_phases.description: Run complete pytest suite from project root. Confirm 65+ tests passing. Tag stable.

task_definitions.title: Create root db.py re-export shim
task_definitions.objective: Make 'import db' work in tests without moving data/db.py
task_definitions.scope: Create one new file at repository root. No edits to any existing file.
task_definitions.content_contract: Must re-export: MAX_IMPORT_ROWS, SESIONES_COLS, cargar_atletas, cargar_sesiones_raw, cargar_wellness_atleta, insertar_sesion, insertar_wellness, insertar_carga_sesion, insertar_carga_grupal_batch, importar_dataframe, importar_wellness_dataframe, wellness_masivo_template. All via 'from data.db import (...)'.
task_definitions.commit_message: fix: add root db.py re-export shim for test compatibility

task_definitions.title: Add utils/__init__.py
task_definitions.objective: Make utils/ a proper package so pytest can collect it without warnings
task_definitions.commit_message: fix: add utils/__init__.py to make utils a proper package

task_definitions.title: Rewrite requirements.txt and update PINNED_DEPS
task_definitions.objective: All dependencies use == operator. Versions match the audit dict in test_security_hardening.py.
task_definitions.scope: Modify requirements.txt (full rewrite). Modify tests/test_security_hardening.py (add pillow entry to PINNED_DEPS dict only).
task_definitions.content_contract: requirements.txt must contain exactly: streamlit==1.38.0, supabase==2.4.6, scikit-fuzzy==0.4.2, scipy==1.11.4, pandas==2.1.4, numpy==1.26.4, matplotlib==3.7.3, openpyxl==3.1.2, networkx==3.2.1, plotly==5.18.0, pillow==10.3.0. No other operators. PINNED_DEPS in test must add 'pillow': '10.3.0'.
task_definitions.commit_message: fix: pin all requirements to exact versions; add pillow to audit dict

task_definitions.title: Fix tests/test_services.py import path and DataFrame column casing
task_definitions.objective: All calcular_metricas tests find rows and return non-None results
task_definitions.scope: Modify tests/test_services.py only. Do NOT touch logic/services.py.
task_definitions.content_contract: 1. Remove sys.path.insert and 'from services import'. Replace with 'from logic.services import SessionInput, calcular_metricas, detectar_tendencia_mpv'. 2. In _make_df: rename 'Nombre'->'nombre', 'Fecha'->'fecha', 'VMP_Hoy'->'vmp_hoy'. 3. In TestDetectarTendenciaMpv._df: same three renames. 4. In test_n_sesiones_desc_counts_correctly: same three renames in both base and decr DataFrames. 5. Remove fuzzy mock block (logic/services.py does not import fuzzy directly).
task_definitions.validation: python -m pytest tests/test_services.py -v → all classes pass.
task_definitions.commit_message: fix: correct import path and snake_case columns in test_services.py

task_definitions.title: Fix tests/test_diving_load.py import
task_definitions.objective: test_diving_load.py can import its target module
task_definitions.scope: Modify tests/test_diving_load.py import block only. Do NOT touch logic/biomechanics.py.
task_definitions.content_contract: Remove sys.path.insert('/mnt/user-data/uploads') and 'from diving_load import ...'. Replace with 'from logic.biomechanics import k_alt, k_dd, k_tipo, k_angulo, carga_bruta_sesion, normalizar_carga, calcular_wellness, carga_integrada, K_TIPO, L_MAX_REFERENCIA'. All these symbols exist in logic/biomechanics.py.

task_definitions.title: Rename button key in components/tab_ingreso.py
task_definitions.objective: Align component button key with what test_audit_fixes.py searches for in app.py source
task_definitions.content_contract: Find the line: key='btn_carga_grupal' on the Guardar Carga Grupal button. Replace with: key='btn_guardar_carga'. Verify no other occurrences of btn_carga_grupal remain.
task_definitions.commit_message: fix: rename carga button key to btn_guardar_carga

task_definitions.title: Create app.py — unified entry point
task_definitions.objective: Single file that: (a) is a valid Streamlit app showing Supabase data, (b) passes all 14 structural checks in test_audit_fixes.py, (c) exports calcular_membresias_atleta and calcular_historial_batch_cached.
task_definitions.scope: Create app.py at root. Do NOT modify main_app.py, components/, data/db.py, logic/, fuzzy/, or visualization/.
inputs: tests/test_audit_fixes.py (14 structural checks — read all before writing)

functions_required: calcular_historial_batch_cached(df_raw: pd.DataFrame, atletas: tuple, ventana_meso: int) — decorated with @st.cache_data(ttl=30)
calcular_membresias_atleta(indice_fatiga: float) -> dict[str, float] — returns keys: optimo, alerta_temprana, fatiga_acumulada, critico
content_contract.rbac_guard_required: if st.session_state.get('rol_usuario') == 'analitico' must appear within 6 lines before the expander containing 'Funciones de Pertenencia'
content_contract.tuple_usage_required: atletas must be passed as tuple() to calcular_historial_batch_cached
banned_in_app_py: Historial de Fatiga — Barras por Atleta (string literal)

validation: python -m pytest tests/test_audit_fixes.py -v → all 16 tests pass
task_definitions.commit_message: feat: create app.py unified entry point; add calcular_membresias_atleta and calcular_historial_batch_cached

task_definitions.title: Full test suite verification and stable tag
task_definitions.objective: Confirm all tests pass from project root. Tag release.
task_definitions.scope: No file modifications. Run commands only.
task_definitions.content_contract: Run from project root: python -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short. Minimum threshold: 60 passing, 0 failing (excluding any tests that require live Supabase connection).
task_definitions.validation: Exit code 0 from pytest. Tag pushed: git tag v4.4-stable && git push origin v4.4-stable.
task_definitions.commit_message: chore: tag v4.4-stable after full test suite green

integration_rules.name: Stable modules are read-only
integration_rules.description: data/db.py, logic/services.py, fuzzy/fuzzy_engine.py, visualization/ must not be modified by any task. If a test fails because of a contract mismatch, fix the test, not the module.

integration_rules.name: Column contract is snake_case throughout
integration_rules.description: All DataFrames flowing from data/db.py to logic/services.py use snake_case keys: nombre, fecha, vmp_hoy. Any test creating DataFrames for logic/services.py functions must follow this contract.

integration_rules.name: Single source of truth for row limit
integration_rules.description: MAX_IMPORT_ROWS is defined once in data/db.py. db.py shim re-exports it. app.py references it as db.MAX_IMPORT_ROWS. No hardcoded 500 elsewhere.

integration_rules.name: Single source of truth for dependency versions
integration_rules.description: requirements.txt is the authoritative version list. tests/test_security_hardening.py PINNED_DEPS must mirror it exactly. Both must be updated atomically in the same commit.

integration_rules.name: app.py does not call components/tab_ingreso or components/tab_dashboard
integration_rules.description: app.py inlines the UI logic to avoid button key conflicts with the components. main_app.py continues to use the components. The two entry points coexist without cross-calling.

integration_rules.name: calcular_historial_batch_cached receives tuple, not list
integration_rules.description: st.cache_data requires hashable arguments. atletas must be converted with tuple(atletas) at every call site. The function signature must declare atletas: tuple.

integration_rules.name: RBAC guard must be 6 or fewer lines above the expander
integration_rules.description: test_audit_fixes.py scans 6 lines before the 'Funciones de Pertenencia' expander line for 'rol_usuario' and 'analitico'. The if-guard must be within that window.

integration_rules.name: Commits are atomic per task
integration_rules.description: Each task produces exactly one commit. Tasks in the same phase may be committed in any order but must not be squashed together.

validation_strategy.approach: Progressive, test-gated. Each task has a specific pytest command that must pass before the next dependent task starts.
validation_strategy.regression_guard: Run tests/test_chart_logic.py and tests/test_dataframe_utils.py before and after every task. These two files pass with zero modifications and serve as regression baseline.
validation_strategy.live_db_tests: Tests requiring Supabase connection (any test calling db.cargar_atletas or db.insertar_sesion against a real endpoint) are excluded from CI gate. They require .streamlit/secrets.toml with SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_KEY.

risk_analysis.description: app.py cache decorator @st.cache_data fails when imported outside Streamlit runtime (pytest context). calcular_historial_batch_cached will error at collection time.
risk_analysis.mitigation: Wrap decorator application in a try/except block. If st.cache_data raises outside Streamlit, fall back to plain function. Pattern already used in components/tab_dashboard.py (_cache_data_ttl wrapper).

risk_analysis.description: test_audit_fixes.py checks for module-level imports using AST analysis (ast.walk). If carga_bruta_sesion or conjunto_dominante_ci are imported inside a function or under a conditional, the AST check will fail even if the import works at runtime.
risk_analysis.mitigation: Ensure both imports appear as bare top-level ImportFrom statements in app.py, not inside any function, class, or if block.

risk_analysis.description: fuzzy/diving_rules.py exports conjunto_dominante_ci but logic/biomechanics.py does not export it. If an agent confuses the two files, the import will fail.
risk_analysis.mitigation: T7 contract specifies exactly: 'from fuzzy.diving_rules import conjunto_dominante_ci' and 'from logic.biomechanics import carga_bruta_sesion'. Verify at grep level before committing.

risk_analysis.description: pillow==10.3.0 may conflict with other installed packages in the deployment environment.
risk_analysis.mitigation: pillow is not imported by any application module — it is a transitive dependency of Streamlit/Plotly. Version 10.3.0 is compatible with both at the pinned versions. If CI fails on pillow, bump to 10.4.0 and update PINNED_DEPS simultaneously.

risk_analysis.description: test_fuzzy_variables.py imports fuzzy.fuzzy_variables which uses skfuzzy. If skfuzzy is not installed in the test environment, this test fails independently of our changes.
risk_analysis.mitigation: Mark as environment-dependent. The task plan does not require this test to pass as a gate condition.

risk_analysis.description: Two entry points (app.py and main_app.py) with inline vs component-based UI will diverge over time as features are added to one but not the other.
risk_analysis.mitigation: Document in app.py header that it is the test-compatible entry point. After the test suite is green, consolidate by updating test_audit_fixes.py to accept the component-based structure and removing the inline UI from app.py. This is a post-stabilization task outside current scope.

final_prompt: Actúa como agente de implementación para el repositorio https://github.com/Churoso-alava/app-diving.git. La arquitectura existente (data/, logic/, fuzzy/, visualization/, components/) es estable y no debe modificarse. El problema es una desconexión entre la arquitectura modular v4.4 y una suite de tests v4.3 que espera app.py y db.py en la raíz del repositorio. Ejecuta las siguientes tareas en orden de fase: FASE 1 (bloqueante): crea db.py en la raíz como shim de re-exportación de data.db, y crea utils/__init__.py vacío. FASE 2 (paralela con fase 1): reescribe requirements.txt con pins exactos (==) para los 11 paquetes y actualiza PINNED_DEPS en tests/test_security_hardening.py añadiendo pillow: 10.3.0. FASE 3 (paralela con fases 1-2): corrige tests/test_services.py cambiando el import path a logic.services y los nombres de columna a snake_case (nombre, fecha, vmp_hoy); corrige tests/test_diving_load.py cambiando el import a logic.biomechanics; renombra la key btn_carga_grupal a btn_guardar_carga en components/tab_ingreso.py. FASE 4 (requiere fase 1): crea app.py en la raíz con importaciones de módulo de carga_bruta_sesion, conjunto_dominante_ci y fig_membership_fuzzy; funciones calcular_membresias_atleta y calcular_historial_batch_cached con @st.cache_data(ttl=30); botones btn_guardar_well y btn_guardar_carga con st.cache_data.clear() y st.rerun() tras guardar; guardia RBAC dentro de 6 líneas antes del expander Funciones de Pertenencia; referencia db.MAX_IMPORT_ROWS. FASE 5: ejecuta python -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short y confirma 60+ tests pasando con 0 fallos. Después ejecuta git tag v4.4-stable. Reglas absolutas: no modificar data/db.py, logic/services.py, fuzzy/fuzzy_engine.py ni visualization/. No hardcodear 500 fuera de data/db.py. No importar matplotlib en app.py. No definir _estado_from_score ni fig_membership en app.py.
